variants.name: Coin Flip Classic
variants.flavor_text: Standard coin flip. Get a streak of 10 heads. Simple as that.

variants.name: Easy Street
variants.flavor_text: Short streak. Biased coin. Extra lives. Your grandma's favorite casino game.

variants.name: Guess Who
variants.flavor_text: Guess heads or tails BEFORE the flip. History might help. Might not.

variants.name: Lucky Penny
variants.flavor_text: This coin loves heads. 70% bias shown on screen. Use it wisely.

variants.name: Tick Tock
variants.flavor_text: 3 seconds per flip. Hesitate and the coin flips itself. Badly.

variants.name: The Collector
variants.flavor_text: No lives to lose. Just accumulate 30 correct flips. Streaks pay double bonus.

variants.name: Alternator
variants.flavor_text: The coin follows a pattern. H-T-H-T-H-T. Figure it out. Two lives.

variants.name: Cluster Luck
variants.flavor_text: Results come in runs. HHHHTTTTHH. Spot the clusters. Ride the wave.

variants.name: One Life
variants.flavor_text: One mistake and it's over. Short streak target. Biased in your favor. No pressure.

variants.name: Accuracy Test
variants.flavor_text: Maintain 70% accuracy over 25 flips. Guess mode. Consistency is everything.

variants.name: Speed Flipper
variants.flavor_text: Auto-flip every 2 seconds. Survive 60 seconds. Fast coins. Faster decisions.

variants.name: Marathon
variants.flavor_text: Twenty in a row. Slightly biased. You'll need patience and luck in equal measure.

variants.name: Blind Guess
variants.flavor_text: Guess mode. No history. No hints. The coin hates you (40% heads). Pure instinct.

variants.name: Momentum
variants.flavor_text: Once you start winning, the coin follows. 95% bias on streaks. Don't break the chain.

variants.name: Score Hunter
variants.flavor_text: 40 correct flips to win. Massive streak bonuses. Die trying or die rich.

variants.name: Pressure Cooker
variants.flavor_text: Guess mode. 2-second timer. Unfair coin. Three lives. Welcome to the cooker.

variants.name: The Narrator
variants.flavor_text: A voice announces every result. Slow dramatic flips. It's like a game show in here.

variants.name: Pattern Master
variants.flavor_text: 80% accuracy over 30 flips. Clusters give clues. Read the pattern or fail.

variants.name: Double or Nothing
variants.flavor_text: One life. Fair coin. Streak of 10. Huge rewards if you make it. You won't.

variants.name: COIN CHAOS
variants.flavor_text: Guess mode. Timed flips. Unfair coin. Cluster patterns. Two lives. Fifteen streak. CHAOS.
